nasb.text: Then you will remember your evil ways and your deeds that were not good, and you will loathe yourselves in your own sight for your iniquities and your abominations.

esv.text: Then you will remember your evil ways, and your deeds that were not good, and you will loathe yourselves for your iniquities and your abominations.

cnv.text: 那時，你們必想起你們的惡行和不好的作為，就必因你們的罪孽和可憎惡的事厭惡自己。

ccb.text: 那时，你们便会想起自己邪恶的行径，并因自己的罪恶和可憎行为而厌恶自己。
